title: Torture Methods Similar to Guantanamo and Abu Ghraib Used Against Members of the Black Panther Party
description: Brochure documenting the 1973 New Orleans torture of Black Panther suspects, with statements from victims and witnesses, distributed by the Committee for the Defense of Human Rights in support of the San Francisco 8.
publisher: Committee for the Defense of Human Rights (CDHR)

title: Africa Today on Grand Jury Repression
description: Africa Today program examining the federal grand jury targeting of Black activists in connection with the SF8 case; features a 1975 interview with Ruben Scott and discussion with Ray Boudreaux.

title: Free the San Francisco 8 [L.A. Prison Times]
description: L.A. Prison Times article covering the SF8 case with focus on activism and political imprisonment.

title: Francisco Torres on the SF8 Dismissal
description: Interview with SF8 defendant Francisco Torres on the case's dismissal after four and a half years of legal battles.

title: Free the SF8 Flyer — March 5, 2008
description: Event flyer for a National Lawyers Guild / MCC panel discussion and benefit concert with activist speakers and performers.

title: SF8 Bookmark & Flyer
description: Promotional materials for a panel and benefit concert featuring SF8 defendants Harold Taylor and Richard Brown, with performers.

title: Signed Photograph of the SF 8
description: Autographed photograph of all eight members of the SF8.

title: Legacy of Torture: The War Against the Black Liberation Movement [San Francisco Bay View]
description: Extensive article by Wanda Sabir examining the SF8 case, with an interview featuring SF8 defendant Richard Brown.

title: Free the San Francisco 8: A 37-Year-Old Case [Drop The Charges]
description: Issue addressing COINTELPRO connections in the SF8 case and including testimonies from partners of the SF8 defendants.
publisher: Committee for the Defense of Human Rights

title: Attorneys Respond to Reopening of Case Against Nine Former Black Panthers [The Sun-Reporter]
description: Sun-Reporter article by Lee Hubbard featuring attorney remarks on the government's use of torture in building the SF8 case.
